name: Entry Level - Technology
description: Clean, modern template for fresh graduates and early-career tech professionals.

content.summary: Motivated and detail-oriented software developer with a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals. Experienced in building web applications using modern technologies. Eager to contribute to innovative projects and grow as a developer.

Reduced page load time by 25% through optimization of front-end components

highlights: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Development, Databases
